caption: In a large, well-lit indoor venue with a high ceiling and recessed lighting, a man dressed in a loose-fitting blue traditional martial arts outfit performs a demonstration on a dark blue carpeted floor. An audience of people in varied casual and formal attire sits in the background, watching the performance. The man begins by shifting his weight and lunging forward, then rotates his body and raises a long wooden staff above his head in a sweeping motion. As the sequence progresses, he steps forward with his left leg while holding the staff diagonally across his body, eventually extending the staff fully upward and backward. The setting remains constant throughout the movements, with the audience remaining seated as the man executes his fluid martial arts forms in the center of the room.
